intentSynonyms: show me my ticket comments in zendesk
view my ticket comments in zendesk
see all my ticket comments in zendesk
list comments on a ticket in zendesk
description: List all comments on a support ticket. Returns comments with author information, body text, creation timestamp, and public/private status. Supports pagination for tickets with many comments.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to list comments for

per_page.description: Number of comments per page (default 25, max 100)
